text:
- Add blob license
- Add additional plugins (goffice, link-grammar, and WordPerfect) in macro OPTIONS (complet list of plugins available in plugin-list.m4).

By default, OpenDocument plugin is only one enabled.

Patch file is too big for web interface: http://avignu.tuxfamily.org/FreeBSD/abiword.diff
